code: import React from'react';import{useEffect}from'react';import{useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Welcome=()=>{const token=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('token'));const[currentUserData,setCurrentUserData]=useState({});const getCurrentUserData=async()=>{try{const rawData=await fetch("".concat(process.env.REACT_APP_BASE_BACKEND_URL,"/authors/me"),{headers:{"authorization":"bearer ".concat(token)}});const data=await rawData.json();console.log(data);setCurrentUserData(data);return data;}catch(error){console.error(error);}};useEffect(()=>{getCurrentUserData();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center gap-3 w-25 bg-warning rounded-3",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"m-0 fs-2",children:"Welcome"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"m-0 fs-2 fw-bold",children:currentUserData.name})]});};export default Welcome;
